---
title: "daemon.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\cstar\core\daemon.py"
loc: 261
complexity: 33
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.59
intel_score: 3.70
overall_score: 1.00
---

## Intent
The `daemon.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on get_daemon, engine_search_sync, process_command, execute_sleep_protocol, CStarDaemon, __init__, engine_search_sync, broadcast_event, process_command, handle_client, execute_sleep_protocol, async_start_daemon, start. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via get_daemon, engine_search_sync, process_command, execute_sleep_protocol, CStarDaemon, __init__, engine_search_sync, broadcast_event, process_command, handle_client, execute_sleep_protocol, async_start_daemon, start. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.6/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 118 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [secrets](file://secrets)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [websockets](file://websockets)
- [websockets.server](file://websockets.server)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)
- [src.core.mimir_client](file://src.core.mimir_client)
- [src.core.norn_coordinator](file://src.core.norn_coordinator)
- [src.core.engine.cognitive_router](file://src.core.engine.cognitive_router)
- [src.core.engine.cognitive_router](file://src.core.engine.cognitive_router)
- [src.core.telemetry](file://src.core.telemetry)
- [src.sentinel.muninn](file://src.sentinel.muninn)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [src.sentinel.wardens.ghost_warden](file://src.sentinel.wardens.ghost_warden)

### Exports
- `get_daemon`
- `engine_search_sync`
- `process_command`
- `execute_sleep_protocol`
- `CStarDaemon`
- `__init__`
- `engine_search_sync`
- `broadcast_event`
- `process_command`
- `handle_client`
- `execute_sleep_protocol`
- `async_start_daemon`
- `start`
